Variables.Name: MaterialInstances
Variables.Description: MIDs we're using to set the desired parameter.

Variables.Name: ResetVectors
Variables.Description: Saved values for restoring state when exiting Matinee.

Variables.Name: PrimitiveMaterialRefs
Variables.Description: Primitive components on which materials have been overridden.

Variables.Name: InstancedTrack
Variables.Description: Track we are an instance of - used in the editor to propagate changes to the track's Materials array immediately.
